en_body:
soft, so soft
light, so light
You
come into the dream
with aloeswood and orchid
one wanton wilderness of languishing smoke

gentle, so gentle
slight, so slight
I turn in sleep
my burning heart guides crimson blood
the candle curves its orange flame
within the dream of pure rose-colored light
I lift, lift the pen
red ink the color of vows
my dreaming flourish
writes the poem of Love

sky: rose-colored
cloud: blushing rose
wind: kissing rose
flower: bursting rose
title of the poem
oh,
the rose-colored dream
note: Aloeswood incense and orchid fragrance create the poem's intimate, dreamlike chamber.
